Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Council of Architects]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The High Council of Architects is a group Shera was meant to meet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Council of Architects has a home located underground on Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Council of Architects is part of the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — The Council of Architects was perplexed by Jyrine's survival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — The Council of Architects is a group that Lucan hopes to join.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Yala speaks with the authority of the High Council of Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Architect Council maintains secret archives.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Kerian is at the top of the Council of Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Council of Architects is the ruling order of the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Architect's Council is a group that may include discontent segments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Council of Architects can be in session.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — The High Council of Architects questioned Shera for information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Architect Council is a governing body Lucan wishes to press for change in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Council of Architects is a group that may know how to contain Nakothi's Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Council of Architects knows the Emperor is weakening.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The High Council of Architects is a body the Guild defers to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Council of Architects advises taking advantage of a ceasefire opportunity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — The High Council of Architects accelerated Shera's timeline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Council of Architects was elected when the last Soulbound to Bastion’s Veil died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The Council of Architects is a group that Meia trusts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Zhen wishes to avoid trouble with the Council of Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The Regents would deal with the Council of Architects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The Council of Architects is hostile to the idea of raising the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Council of Architects is a governing body that should have been informed about the Gardeners' actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Council of Architects is responsible for the day-to-day maintenance of Guild affairs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Council of Architects is not known for drastic action.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
